channel.title: Arup Ghosh
channel.description: Personal website of Arup Ghosh, a computational biologist and bioinformatician. I am interested in single-cell genomics, spatial transcriptomics, and computational methods for analyzing high-dimensional biological data.

item.title: Speed Up R Package Installation
item.description: Reduce R package installation time, make Rcpp builds parallel, and other tricks

item.title: Fixing ImageMagick "convert" on Cloudflare Pages
item.description: A practical fix for the ImageMagick convert command missing during Cloudflare Pages Jekyll builds.

item.title: Jupyter on an SGE Cluster with Reverse SSH Tunneling
item.description: How to run Jupyter Notebook on an SGE cluster and access it securely using reverse SSH tunneling.

item.title: Run a Secure Jupyter Notebook Server on CentOS 7
item.description: A concise guide to installing and configuring a secure Jupyter Notebook server on CentOS 7.
